raw_jd:
## What you'll do

- Own the design and delivery of production AI features, end to end, across Angular and NestJS / TypeScript.
- Architect RAG and agentic systems. Build the evaluation frameworks that prove they work, and tune them for cost, latency, and accuracy.
- Run services on AWS (Lambda, API Gateway) with Postgres, and access models via AWS Bedrock (preferred). Integrate tools and data via MCP, and own reliability and observability.
- Set engineering standards, review hard, and mentor junior engineers.
- Make sharp build-vs-buy calls and back them with evidence.
- Handle sensitive financial data responsibly — our product serves regulated lenders.

## What you bring

- 5–6 years building production software, with meaningful time in applied AI / ML.
- Deep TypeScript, with strong Angular and NestJS.
- Strong SQL and Postgres — you design schemas and queries that hold up under load.
- A track record shipping LLM-powered systems: RAG, prompting, evaluation, and agentic / tool-use patterns.
- Solid AWS and a real grasp of how to keep production systems fast and reliable.
- Judgment — you know which problems deserve a model, which deserve code, and which deserve neither.

## Nice to have

- Fintech or financial-services experience (preferred).
- Familiarity with data-privacy frameworks for financial data (e.g., PIPEDA) — our customers are Canadian lenders.
- Experience with MCP, Python, vector databases, or model-governance practices.
- Product develo

gemini_verdict.experience_reason: The JD explicitly requires 5-6 years of professional experience, which disqualifies a fresher.
gemini_verdict.profile_reason: The candidate has 0 years of experience, while the role requires 5-6 years of senior-level production experience.
gemini_verdict.title: Software Developer
gemini_verdict.summary: A senior-level software developer role focused on building and scaling AI-driven financial services infrastructure. The position involves designing RAG systems, managing AWS production environments, and mentoring junior engineers.
gemini_verdict.match_reason: The candidate has 0 years of experience, while the role requires 5-6 years of senior-level production experience.
